product.name: Radio Vaigyaaniq Plug-and-Play Streaming Device
product.tagline: Local audio. Local proof. Local control.

deviceFrame.enclosure: single-board appliance with audio input, audio output, local display, storage, and status LEDs

runtimeModules.label: Local Audio Capture
runtimeModules.description: Captures microphone or line-in audio into the local runtime boundary.
runtimeModules.blockedReason: Physical audio IO has not been verified on target hardware.

runtimeModules.label: Offline Playlist Engine
runtimeModules.description: Runs signed local audio packs without external network dependency.
runtimeModules.blockedReason: Signed release authority is not verified.

runtimeModules.label: Loopback Stream Driver
runtimeModules.description: Routes device status and playback state across local loopback ports.
runtimeModules.blockedReason: Physical stress and interruption tests are not complete.

runtimeModules.label: Field Recovery Console
runtimeModules.description: Operator-safe recovery view for failed audio, power, or storage checks.

runtimeModules.label: Session Evidence Receipt
runtimeModules.description: Exports session logs, content pack hash, device identity, and operator acknowledgement.
runtimeModules.blockedReason: Hardware root attestation and operator quorum are missing.

operatorCopy.ready: Device is locally armed for preview playback.
operatorCopy.blocked: Production broadcast is blocked until hardware root, release signature, quorum, and rollback evidence pass.
operatorCopy.offline: Device remains usable for local preview without internet.
